_comment: Manual round ledger. Source codes: body=parsed from OP post body; prev-top=top comment of previous post; list=mentioned in OP's running removal list; map=visible on round map; deduced=only state left unaccounted for; guess=editorial guess (low confidence).

rounds.note: Initial 50-state map; no elimination.
Top comment of #1 was Texas (score 91). TX appears in #20 removal list.
Florida in #20 list. Final ownership chain places it in the NM 'Gulf of New Mexico' bloc.
Idaho in #20 list. Assigned to Cascadia (OR) bloc.
South Dakota in #20 list. Assigned to MN (Greater Minnesota) bloc.
Demolished by VA/KY/OH/MD/PA — primary absorber VA per area.
Eaten by its neighbours.
Top of #7 was SC. OP initially labelled NC by mistake; corrected in #11.
Top of #8 was Arkansas.
Top of #9 was Ohio.
Map didn't visibly change; absorbed by MA. Also reverted NC/SC swap.
Top of #11 was North Dakota.
Top of #12 was New Jersey; NJ appears in #21 list.
Primarily by TN (T-shape), with GA/MS contributions.
Top of #14 was Missouri.
Eaten by LA and GA; LA primary.
Indiana, blocking 'Pennsyltucky' unification.
Top of #17 was 'Make an example of New Hampshire'.
Oklahoma.
Delaware.
Alaska eaten by Hawaii.
Top of #21 was Utah.
Connecticut.
Top of #23 was Wyoming.
One of the three states with no post; Iowa is the only Midwest state otherwise unaccounted for.
Primarily PA, with TN/IL nibbles.
Louisiana cancelled elections... forfeit to NM.
Tennessee succumbs.
Top of #28 was 'Maine still looks too normal, feed it to Vermont'.
Confederate state; gone by #32 per OP's reasoning. Likely absorbed by MD/NC empires.
Nevada — last Western state with no body; likely Colorado bloc.
Confederate-states request: NC chosen for permanent removal.
Sacrificed to NME (NM) and California.
Land of the virgins eaten by Maryland.
Swallowed by Vermonster and Massivechusetts (mostly VT).
WA merged into OR -> Cascadia.
MA merged into VT -> 'The Vermomster'.
Kansas.
Montana.
Hawaii beached in SoCal; CO to coast; NM sea-to-shining-sea; Cascadia south. NM gets the largest slice.
Illinois.
Maryland crab eats Pennsylvania. GME (Great Maryland Empire).
